content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt:1-3 claims "AI-powered suggestions," "Built-in ad blocker," and "Works fully offline," but ContentView.swift only implements a plain local array-backed task list with no AI/ML, no ad-blocking, and no offline-sync logic or network layer at all.

Pierre: Apple reviewers routinely test marketing claims against actual app behavior, and unsubstantiated AI/ad-block/offline claims are a common 2.1 rejection reason since the app "does not perform as advertised." I found no CoreML/CreateML imports, no content-blocker extension target, and no persistence/network code supporting "offline" — just an in-memory `[String]` list. Either implement these features or rewrite the description to match what TaskTide actually does today.
